'''Keval Raffaan''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] from [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. He studied at the [[Diplomatic Institute]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before becoming the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ma'tien]]. He was sent to [[Muzara]] to negotiate the disputes between the Human colonists and the indigenous [[Muza]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Ruins of Kabus-Dabeh|book=Tales of the Jedi Companion}} {{1st}}
